notes: Starts fine without any tweaks. Occasionally crashes to desktop. Text display gets cut off on top. This can be fixed by installing fonts (Courier New + Wingdings (I think)) from Windows.
title: Tokyo Dark

notes:
Well, as soon as it started, it seems to be fine, but before I could enter the main menu, it crashed two times; after that, it was fine, had some lags, but nothing terrible.
Can't promise that there won't be more crashes, as it was already reported.
title: Tokyo Dark

notes: Has worked well so far after adding "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%" to launch options.
title: Tokyo Dark
